description: Mattermost is open at the login screen in the web browser. Log in with username 'admin' and password 'Admin1234!'. There is a user named 'qa.tester' (email: qa.tester@mattermost.local) in the 'Main Team' workspace who is not yet a member of the 'Release Updates' channel. Navigate to the 'Release Updates' channel and add the user 'qa.tester' to this channel using the channel members management interface.
